Table of Contents

Enum esriLockMgrType

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.esriSystem
Assembly
ESRI.Server.System.dll

Esri lock manager types.

[Guid("583257C3-207D-11D3-B7DC-0000F878098D")]
public enum esriLockMgrType

Fields

esriLockMgrEdit = 3

3: Edit lock. Will block all edits of the data and prevents anyone from writing to the dataset, allows for read access.

esriLockMgrNone = 0

0: No lock.

esriLockMgrRead = 1

1: Read-only lock.

esriLockMgrSchemaRead = 4

4: Schema read lock. Creates a shared read lock. Prevents others from editing the schema of the data such as editing its attributes.

esriLockMgrSchemaWrite = 5

5: Schema write lock. Creates an exclusive write lock. Prevents all reads, edits and writes of the data.

esriLockMgrWrite = 2

2: Write lock. Prevents anyone else from reading or writing to the dataset.

Made with docfx
